title: ilex latifrons var. pilosissima
intro: Ilex latifrons var. pilosissima, also known as the hairy-leaved holly, is a plant species in the Ilex genus, characterized by its unique hairy leaves and small white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ilex latifrons var. pilosissima include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
